title: World Orbital
description: Based off Wemmbu's orbital strike cannons!
body:
This mod is based on the Unstable SMP, specifically the orbital strike cannons Wemmbu used, its the exact same with Stabs and Nuke shots, and I will add more in the future. It's fun to use and it works on servers.

**INSTRUCTIONS**

**COMMANDS**
Use /wb or /worldorbital.

**TYPES**
- "Nuke"
- "Stab"
- "Ball"
- "Plane"
- "Cylinder"
- "ChunkEater"
  
**HOW TO USE**
/wb create-orbital *random name* *type*

While holding a fishing rod do
/wb fishing-rod-link *name you used for you're create-orbital*

**MODES**
In creative, the item will obviously not break, if you're in survival it will break instantly no matter what durability as long as it is linked.
